name: saas-profit-finder
description: SaaS Profit Finder — anti-hallucination Claude Code plugin that discovers, validates, and ranks profitable SaaS opportunities through a structured intake interview, market mapping, pain mining, evidence verification, adversarial review, and 14-day validation plans.

plugins.name: saas-profit-finder
plugins.description: 1 orchestrator skill + 8 specialist agents + /saas-hunt slash command. Refuses to brainstorm generic SaaS ideas until the 30-question intake is complete. Forces evidence-backed claims, gray-zone = unvalidated, and Devil's Advocate review before final ranking.
